name: NINA SEAPOP Source — OBIS Occurrence Record
abstract: Source-faithful representation of a single occurrence record as returned by the OBIS v3 occurrence API for the NINA SEAPOP seabird colony monitoring dataset (dataset ID 561441ab-128b-4be7-8fce-de1ef79855da). Encodes the raw flat JSON structure including both original Darwin Core fields and OBIS-enrichment fields (bathymetry, shoredistance, sst, sss, aphiaID). Intended as the source-side contract in a source→target transformation pipeline.

sources.title: OBIS v3 occurrence API — NINA SEAPOP dataset
